---
title: "Example catalog"
description: "Every tracked GenesisCode example and agent workflow."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

# Examples by workflow

**34 workflows** · **171 files**. Examples demonstrate composition; normative behavior comes from linked specifications.

## `agent_backend_topology_workflow`

Agent Backend Topology Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_backend_topology_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_backend_topology_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_backend_topology_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_browser_runtime_workflow`

Agent Browser Runtime Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_browser_runtime_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_browser_runtime_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_browser_runtime_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_compute_workflow`

Agent Compute Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | md | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_compute_workflow/README.md) |
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_compute_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `gpu_parallel.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_compute_workflow/gpu_parallel.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_compute_workflow/package.toml) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_compute_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_compute_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_compute_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_deploy_android_workflow`

Agent Deploy Android Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_deploy_android_workflow/workflow.sh) |

## `agent_deploy_bundle_workflow`

Agent Deploy Bundle Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_deploy_bundle_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `lib.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_deploy_bundle_workflow/lib.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_deploy_bundle_workflow/package.toml) |
| `target_workflow_lib.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_deploy_bundle_workflow/target_workflow_lib.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_deploy_bundle_workflow/workflow.sh) |

## `agent_deploy_edge_workflow`

Agent Deploy Edge Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_deploy_edge_workflow/workflow.sh) |

## `agent_deploy_ios_workflow`

Agent Deploy Ios Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_deploy_ios_workflow/workflow.sh) |

## `agent_deploy_service_runtime_workflow`

Agent Deploy Service Runtime Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_deploy_service_runtime_workflow/workflow.sh) |

## `agent_durable_data_workflow`

Agent Durable Data Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_durable_data_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_durable_data_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_durable_data_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_durable_data_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_filesystem_workflow`

Agent Filesystem Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_filesystem_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_filesystem_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_filesystem_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_gpu_compute_workflow`

Agent GPU Compute Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | md | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_gpu_compute_workflow/README.md) |
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_gpu_compute_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `compute_parallel.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_gpu_compute_workflow/compute_parallel.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_gpu_compute_workflow/package.toml) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_gpu_compute_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_gpu_compute_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_gpu_compute_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_hardware_device_bridge_workflow`

Agent Hardware Device Bridge Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_hardware_device_bridge_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_hardware_device_bridge_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_hardware_device_bridge_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_hardware_device_bridge_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_inbound_server_workflow`

Agent Inbound Server Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_inbound_server_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_inbound_server_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_inbound_server_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_inbound_server_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_interactive_gfx_compute_workflow`

Agent Interactive GFX + Compute Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | md | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_interactive_gfx_compute_workflow/README.md) |
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_interactive_gfx_compute_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `interactive.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_interactive_gfx_compute_workflow/interactive.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_interactive_gfx_compute_workflow/package.toml) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_interactive_gfx_compute_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_interactive_gfx_compute_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_interactive_gfx_compute_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_long_running_gfx_loop_workflow`

Agent Long-Running GFX Loop Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | md | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_long_running_gfx_loop_workflow/README.md) |
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_long_running_gfx_loop_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `loop.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_long_running_gfx_loop_workflow/loop.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_long_running_gfx_loop_workflow/package.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_long_running_gfx_loop_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_long_running_gfx_loop_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_media_asset_workflow`

Agent Media Asset Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_media_asset_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_media_asset_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_media_asset_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |
| `workflow_run.gclog` | gclog | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_media_asset_workflow/workflow_run.gclog) |

## `agent_ml_pipeline_variant_workflow`

Agent Ml Pipeline Variant Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_ml_pipeline_variant_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_ml_pipeline_variant_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_ml_pipeline_variant_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_multi_agent_orchestration_workflow`

Agent Multi Agent Orchestration Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_multi_agent_orchestration_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_multi_agent_orchestration_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_multi_agent_orchestration_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_multi_package_publish_workflow`

Agent Multi-Package Publish Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | md | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_multi_package_publish_workflow/README.md) |
| `app.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_multi_package_publish_workflow/app/app.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_multi_package_publish_workflow/app/package.toml) |
| `lib.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_multi_package_publish_workflow/lib/lib.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_multi_package_publish_workflow/lib/package.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_multi_package_publish_workflow/workflow.sh) |

## `agent_network_process_workflow`

Agent Network + Process Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | md | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_network_process_workflow/README.md) |
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_network_process_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_network_process_workflow/package.toml) |
| `service.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_network_process_workflow/service.gc) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_network_process_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_network_process_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_network_process_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |
| `workflow_run.gclog` | gclog | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_network_process_workflow/workflow_run.gclog) |

## `agent_plugin_runtime_workflow`

Agent Plugin Runtime Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_plugin_runtime_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_plugin_runtime_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_plugin_runtime_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_plugin_runtime_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_process_lifecycle_workflow`

Agent Process Lifecycle Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_process_lifecycle_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_process_lifecycle_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_process_lifecycle_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_process_lifecycle_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_raw_network_sockets_workflow`

Agent Raw Network Sockets Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_raw_network_sockets_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `host_bridge.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_raw_network_sockets_workflow/tools/host_bridge.sh) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_raw_network_sockets_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_raw_network_sockets_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_realtime_collaboration_workflow`

Agent Realtime Collaboration Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_realtime_collaboration_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_realtime_collaboration_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_realtime_collaboration_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_semantic_refactor_apply_workflow`

Agent Semantic Refactor Apply Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_semantic_refactor_apply_workflow/workflow.sh) |

## `agent_service_workflow`

Agent Service Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | md | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_service_workflow/README.md) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_service_workflow/package.toml) |
| `service.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_service_workflow/service.gc) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_service_workflow/workflow.sh) |

## `agent_time_control_workflow`

Agent Time Control Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_time_control_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_time_control_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_time_control_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_ui_app_stack_workflow`

Agent Ui App Stack Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_ui_app_stack_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_ui_app_stack_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_ui_app_stack_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `agent_xr_runtime_workflow`

Agent Xr Runtime Workflow

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_xr_runtime_workflow/caps.toml) |
| `workflow.sh` | sh | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_xr_runtime_workflow/workflow.sh) |
| `workflow_run.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/agent_xr_runtime_workflow/workflow_run.gc) |

## `canonical_language`

GenesisCode Canonical Language Examples v0.1

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | md | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/README.md) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/contracts/invalid/main.gc) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/contracts/valid/main.gc) |
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/effects/invalid/caps.toml) |
| `data.txt` | txt | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/effects/invalid/data.txt) |
| `program.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/effects/invalid/program.gc) |
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/effects/valid/caps.toml) |
| `data.txt` | txt | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/effects/valid/data.txt) |
| `program.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/effects/valid/program.gc) |
| `app.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/modules/invalid/app.gc) |
| `math.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/modules/invalid/math.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/modules/invalid/package.toml) |
| `app.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/modules/valid/app.gc) |
| `math.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/modules/valid/math.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/modules/valid/package.toml) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/packages/invalid/main.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/packages/invalid/package.toml) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/packages/valid/main.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/packages/valid/package.toml) |
| `change.gcpatch` | gcpatch | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/patches/invalid/change.gcpatch) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/patches/invalid/main.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/patches/invalid/package.toml) |
| `change.gcpatch` | gcpatch | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/patches/valid/change.gcpatch) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/patches/valid/main.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/patches/valid/package.toml) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/persistent-collections/invalid/main.gc) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/persistent-collections/valid/main.gc) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/pure-functions/invalid/main.gc) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/pure-functions/valid/main.gc) |
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/replay/invalid/caps.toml) |
| `data.txt` | txt | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/replay/invalid/data.txt) |
| `program.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/replay/invalid/program.gc) |
| `run.gclog` | gclog | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/replay/invalid/run.gclog) |
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/replay/valid/caps.toml) |
| `data.txt` | txt | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/replay/valid/data.txt) |
| `program.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/replay/valid/program.gc) |
| `run.gclog` | gclog | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/replay/valid/run.gclog) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/resource-failures/invalid/main.gc) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/resource-failures/valid/main.gc) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/sealed-errors/invalid/main.gc) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/sealed-errors/valid/main.gc) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/tests/invalid/main.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/tests/invalid/package.toml) |
| `main.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/tests/valid/main.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/tests/valid/package.toml) |
| `suite.json` | json | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/suite.json) |

## `effects_demo`

Effects Demo

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/effects_demo/caps.toml) |
| `data.txt` | txt | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/effects_demo/data.txt) |
| `read.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/effects_demo/read.gc) |

## `gfx_demos`

Graphics Demos (.gc only)

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | md | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/gfx_demos/README.md) |
| `hybrid_web.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/gfx_demos/hybrid_web.gc) |
| `scene3d.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/gfx_demos/scene3d.gc) |
| `ui_app.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/gfx_demos/ui_app.gc) |

## `hello_pkg`

Hello Pkg

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/hello_pkg/caps.toml) |
| `hello.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/hello_pkg/hello.gc) |
| `package.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/hello_pkg/package.toml) |
| `toolcaps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/hello_pkg/toolcaps.toml) |

## `selfhost_tools`

Selfhost Tools

| File | Kind | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `caps.toml` | toml | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/selfhost_tools/caps.toml) |
| `fmt_file.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/selfhost_tools/fmt_file.gc) |
| `input.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/selfhost_tools/input.gc) |
| `output.gc` | gc | [open](https://github.com/corbensorenson/genesisCode/blob/master/examples/selfhost_tools/output.gc) |
